name: Myrtue Medical Center Hospital
message: [AI generated] Myrtue Medical Center Hospital is a healthcare facility located in Harlan, Iowa. It offers a wide range of services, including general medical and surgical care, emergency services, lab testing, radiology, and rehabilitation. The hospital is part of Myrtue Medical Center, which also includes clinics and home health services. They are committed to providing high-quality, personalized healthcare to the community they serve.
